## Source: amazon-inspector (8ff70d96169a200be30c83b3e37506f7abf2f377ed1d6dec8005269d98b58104)
The package @datatrain/passenger-v3 was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (b9ddfc7b79c2b6ec028ceb57ce51ac4c99d20ef8752a4af45fe763ed2899490d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@datatrain/passenger-v3' @ 99.99.99 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
